name: The Hopital Pack (FREE)
when: DEFAULT plug for casual interest: someone enjoying the cases, asking if there are more, or new to the account. Zero friction — 6 wild cases, free.

name: Weird X-Ray Case Files: The Complete Collection
when: Superfans: 'I could read these all day', 'I'd buy a whole book of this', asks for everything in one place. Six editions, 140 cases, every answer.

name: Could You Spot It?
when: Someone who loves the GUESSING game specifically — 50 of the strangest cases, one guess per page, flip for the answer.

name: Weird X-Ray Case Files: Volume 1
when: Someone asking where to START with a paid edition — the original 20 cases explained in simple language.

name: Weird X-Ray Case Files: Volume 2
when: Readers who already read Volume 1 and want the next 20 bizarre cases.

name: Weird X-Ray Case Files: Volume 3
when: Returning readers who already know the series and want the NEWEST 20 cases.

name: Rarest Findings
when: Comments obsessed with how RARE a case is ('how rare is this', 'never seen anything like it') — the 10 rarest cases in radiology.

name: Hopital Field Edition
when: In-joke moments around the 'hopital' meme — 20 wild cases where the only answer is hopital.

name: It's Just Anxiety — the medical gaslighting card game
when: Jokes or stories about being dismissed by doctors ('they said it was anxiety/stress/in my head') where the commenter is JOKING, not sharing raw pain — 120 cards, most dismissive answer wins.

name: Volume 4 waitlist (free to join)
when: Someone who finished/owns the previous volumes and asks what's next.
